sections.content: The top 2 green blocks are gone! The pattern works: click green block, move RIGHT, click next green block. Let me continue with the remaining green blocks. I need to check how many are left and their positions.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check remaining green blocks
seg = current_frame.segmentation
greens = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] > 5]
print(f"Green: {len(greens)}")
for g in greens:
    b = g['boundary']
    center = (sum(r[0] for r in b)//len(b), sum(r[1] for r in b)//len(b))
    print(f"  center={center}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
